concepts.name: Garden Seal Studio
concepts.idea: Two protective arcs gather around two stems and one growth node. This is the clearest evolution of the Garden Seal you liked, with less scenery and a stronger shelf silhouette.
concepts.motionLabel: Arcs gather, stems rise, leaves settle
concepts.watchout: Keep the left-side openings and botanical center distinct during vector refinement so it never becomes a loading ring or a person icon.

concepts.name: Shared Soil
concepts.idea: Two different grounded forms make room for one new shoot. It carries the relationship metaphor without a ring, heart, people, or literal bonsai.
concepts.motionLabel: Grounds meet, shoot rises, leaf turns
concepts.watchout: Refine the left notch and center join as exact geometry so the mark reads as shared support rather than a letterform.

concepts.name: Living Weave
concepts.idea: Two paths cross once, exchange support, and continue as separate growing forms. The diagonal construction gives this direction the strongest launch-animation energy.
concepts.motionLabel: Paths cross, nodes pass, tips open
concepts.watchout: Keep one crossing only and simplify the two saffron nodes during vector refinement so it never becomes a sports, celebration, or generic link mark.

concepts.name: Seed Exchange
concepts.idea: Two open growth forms pass a seed through the center. It turns reciprocity into a compact symbol and avoids the closed-loop language used by many relationship apps.
concepts.motionLabel: Forms turn, seed passes, pair rests
concepts.watchout: Preserve the diagonal opening and asymmetric tips in the vector master so the mark cannot collapse into a refresh, yin-yang, or orbit icon.
